raw: This is an e-voucher . Promo Code is e-mailed to the patron. Each Promo Code use allows 2 people at $15 per adult, $10 per child age 7-17. Children 6 and under are admitted for free. Note: The date of your museum visit must match the date on the library pass. For the most up-to-date information on museum programs and hours, please visit their website .
